span.p:
LRU
Least Recently Used
✓ O(1) operations
✗ Scan vulnerable

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
LRU-K
K-th Reference Tracking
✓ Scan resistant
✗ Complex, needs tuning

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
2Q
Two Queue System
✓ Simple, O(1)
✓ Scan resistant

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
ARC
Adaptive Replacement
✓ Self-tuning
✓ Patent expired 2024

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
SIEVE
Lazy Promotion/Eviction
✓ Simpler than LRU
✓ Better hit rates
